scripts.setup: pnpm -C frontend install && npm --prefix backend install && npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:deploy
scripts.check: npm run check:build && npm run smoke:local
scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,green "pnpm -C frontend dev" "npm --prefix backend run dev"
scripts.build: pnpm -C frontend build && npm --prefix backend run build
scripts.check:build: pnpm -C frontend build && npm --prefix backend run build
